security.title: Bank-Level Security
security.description: Your data is encrypted and secure. We use secure connection providers trusted by millions of users worldwide

detectingOtherBanks.title: We’re detecting your other business banks
detectingOtherBanks.content: Save time and connect other banks you use to run your business now

items.question: Why do I need to connect bank accounts to Uncapped?
items.answer: Creating a read-only bank connection allows us to analyze your revenue using our underwriting models and provide you with much faster and higher offers compared to  slow, error-prone and insecure methods like bank statement uploads.

items.question: How do you secure my data?
items.answer: We use trusted connection providers and best-in-class encryption protocols like the Advanced Encryption Standard (AES 256) and Transport Layer Security (TLS) to securely access read-only transaction data.

items.question: What can I do if my bank isn’t available?
items.answer: If your bank isn’t available try using our <bank-search-link>other connection methods</bank-search-link> which support banks from other countries. We do not support submitting bank statements at this time.

missingBankNotice.title: Missing bank detection
missingBankNotice.content: Speed up your application by connecting all your business banks now. We automatically detect banks that haven’t been connected during underwriting.

payoneerAlternative.title: Looking for Payoneer?
payoneerAlternative.description: Payoneer isn’t available through our default provider, but you can connect it directly here — works for both UK and US businesses.

banking.submit: I’ve connected all my business banks

bankingSearch.title: Bank accounts

notification.title: What happens now?
notification.content: We’ll notify you via SMS and email when underwriting is complete or if we need more information. In rare cases, our analysis can take longer than expected due to high demand, this does not mean your application will be rejected.

RefinanceLocV2.description: Refinance your existing balance into a Revolving Line of Credit. You can borrow up to a maximum of {{amount}}. As you repay, you will be able to re-borrow.

RefinanceLocV2.repaymentPeriodDescription: After the Draw Period, you will no longer be able to borrow further funds. Your outstanding balance, including future interest, will be repaid in {{instalments}} equal instalments, every {{days}} days.

summary.title: Offer summary
summary.description: Cash upfront. Flexible payments. Pay back with a percentage of your sales, so slow periods mean smaller payments.

sidebar.title: Example of how payments are charged

banner.title: Get Paid Every Day
banner.subtitle: Daily Payouts allows you to receive {{rate}} of your marketplace balance every business day

advanceRate.title: Advance rate
advanceRate.description: Receive an initial {{rate}} lump sum of your available and deferred balance, then {{rate}} of your net daily sales, with up to {{limit}} advanced at any time

dailyFee.title: Daily fee
dailyFee.description: This is applied to the principal balance each day

repayments.title: Repayments
repayments.description: When your marketplace pays out, we collect our fees and only what’s needed to keep us at {{rate}} of your new marketplace balance.

example.title: Example
example.subtitle: Amazon holds all 14 days of your sales for one lump sum payout

dailyPayout.calculatorLink: Calculate your advances and repayments over time

animation.subtitle: Daily Payouts from Uncapped
animation.step1: Your competitors get paid every 14 days. You don't have to.
animation.step2: Unlock up to {{rate}} of your payout and deferred balance today, so you can reinvest in growth while your competition waits.
animation.step3: Continue to receive up to {{rate}} of your net revenue each day of your payout cycle.
animation.step4: When your marketplace payout is received, you keep the remainder minus our fees (~1-3%).
animation.step5: This continues until you tell us to stop. Anytime.

whyWeBetter.title: Why we're better

amortising.title: Amortising
amortising.description: Regular repayments of principal and interest are made until the loan is repaid in full

bullet.title: Bullet
bullet.description: The loan balance is repaid at the end of the loan term, low or no repayments are made until then

revolving.title: Revolving Line of Credit
revolving.description: Credit facility that enables you to draw on the facility when you needs funds

convertible.title: Convertible Loan
convertible.description: A form of unsecured debt that give the investor an option to convert their loan to equity in the future

revenueBasedFinancing.title: Revenue Based Financing (MCA)
revenueBasedFinancing.description: Funding in exchange for a pre-agreed percentage of future revenue

other.title: Other debt type
other.description: This could be items such as Purchase order financing, invoice factoring, or other debt like items

securityTypeOptions.secured_description: Includes a promise to transfer assets to the lender if you can’t pay back the debt

why.title: Why disclosing debt is the only way to get an offer
points: Our system detects missing debt information
We understand the financing needs of our customers and already work with thousands of businesses who have outstanding debt
We reject more customers due to undisclosed debt than outstanding debt

WelcomeBack.title: Welcome back to Uncapped

rejected.title: No funding available
content: Thanks for completing your application. We are unable to provide funding at this stage because {{reason}}.
Please consider re-applying whenever your business circumstances change. You will need to wait until {{reapplyDate}} before being able to apply again.
In the meantime read our guides to funding your growth.

rejectedWithReapply.title: Welcome back to Uncapped
content: We were unable to previously provide funding because {{reason}}.

If your circumstances have changed, you can easily re-apply through our portal. We are here to support you every step of the way so if you have any questions or need a helping hand, please reach out to us via live chat.

expired.title: Your offer has expired
content: The funding offer that was previously available has unfortunately expired.
You can easily re-apply through our portal. We are here to support you every step of the way so if you have any questions or need a helping hand, please reach out to us via live chat.

lost.title: Welcome back to Uncapped
content: Your previous application was left incomplete so we’ve closed your application for now.
You can easily re-apply through our portal. We are here to support you every step of the way so if you have any questions or need a helping hand, please reach out to us via live chat.

reapplyForm.description: We’ve saved the progress of your last application, so there’s no need to start from scratch

reapplyForm.fundingAmountPlaceholder: How much money are you looking for?
reapplyForm.fundingTypesTitle: What types of funding are available from Uncapped?

lineOfCredit.label: Line of Credit
bullets: Draw, repay, and reuse funds as needed
Scale faster with a credit limit that grows as your revenue does
Built for 7-figure sellers with 2+ years of trading

termLoan.label: Term Loan
bullets: Low fixed cost with clear, predictable repayments
Keep growing with top-ups as you pay down your balance
Built for sellers who value control and predictable growth

cashAdvance.label: Cash Advance
bullets: Flexible repayments with no fixed cash flow pressure
Receive cash upfront to invest, and repay as you earn
Built for sellers who plan for the ups and downs

PartnerBlocked.title: Welcome back to Uncapped
content: It looks like you’ve already started an application with Uncapped. That means we’re unable to create a new application from a partner account at this time.
We’ve saved the progress of your existing application. Complete it now to receive an offer in as little as 24 hours.
contentActive: It looks like you’re already an Uncapped customer. That means we’re unable to create a new application from a partner account at this time.
If you need access to more funding, you’ll be offered the chance to top-up once you start making repayments on your existing Uncapped loan.

PartnershipWelcomeModal.title: Welcome to your new Uncapped account
PartnershipWelcomeModal.copy: Apply for additional funding by connecting your sales and bank accounts. You can also manage your existing {{sourceType}} loan and all your repayments
